Package main.services.endpoints

Enum Class DiscoveryEndpoints

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<DiscoveryEndpoints>
main.services.endpoints.DiscoveryEndpoints
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<DiscoveryEndpoints>, Constable, Endpoint
public enum DiscoveryEndpoints extends Enum<DiscoveryEndpoints> implements Endpoint
Endpoints for the service Discovery
